---
title: ""
---

::::: columns
::: {.column width="35%"}
![](images/profile.png){width="100%"}
:::

::: {.column width="65%"}
![](images/UniversityofPennsylvania_FullLogo_RGB.png){width="250px"}

# Student Name

University of Pennsylvaina

Welcome to my personal website.

### Quick Links

<div>
  <a href="https://github.com/USERNAME"><i class="bi bi-github fs-3"></i></a>
  <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/USERNAME"><i class="bi bi-linkedin fs-3"></i></a>
  <a href="resume.qmd"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person-fill fs-3"></i></a>
  <a href="mailto:student@email.com"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill fs-3"></i></a>
</div>
:::
:::::
